grant_and_term.grant: Non-exclusive license to use Marks and System in operation of Jazzercise Dance Fitness Program
grant_and_term.territory: Non-exclusive geographic area (state or portion); no territorial or exclusive rights whatsoever
grant_and_term.renewal: One 5-year renewal if conditions met; must sign then-current FA which may be materially different

fee_obligations.continuing_royalty: 20% of gross member enrollment (10% for certain programs)
fee_obligations.marketing_fee: If and when ad fund established
fee_obligations.performance_royalties: Music licensing royalties based on member count
fee_obligations.payment_method: Via Jazzercise website; Glofox Stripe; or other designated system
fee_obligations.no_withholding: No right to withhold payment for any reason
fee_obligations.offset_right: Franchisor may offset amounts owed to franchisee against amounts franchisee owes
fee_obligations.taxes: Franchisee must pay any tax imposed on franchisor resulting from fee payments

site_selection.franchisor_consent: Required within 30 days of Site Proposal
site_selection.lease_requirements: Conditional assignment to Jazzercise, Jazzercise signage consent, default notification, no amendment without consent, lease assigns to Jazzercise on termination/expiration

training_obligations.initial_training: Mandatory; must complete within 6 months of signing
training_obligations.ongoing_training: Must comply with all training requests
training_obligations.franchise_meetings: May be required to attend in future

operational_obligations.must_offer_on_demand: Must offer Jazzercise On Demand to members
operational_obligations.facility_standards: Must maintain facility to Jazzercise standards
operational_obligations.social_media_compliance: Must comply with online and social media policies; violation may result in termination
operational_obligations.data_restrictions: May not copy, transfer, or use member PII; must return member lists on termination
operational_obligations.franchisor_data_access: Franchisor may access and download all computer system data; no contractual limitations

key_non_curable: Failure to obtain location consent within 3 months
Failure to teach first class within 30 days of certification
Failure to open location within 3 months of certification
Failure to complete training within 6 months
Felony conviction or no contest plea
termination_triggers.cross_default: Termination of any other agreement with Jazzercise triggers cross-default

conditions: Premises in compliance with current standards
transfer_restrictions.location_transfer: May transfer individual location to existing franchisee in territory by written notice to franchise business advisor
transfer_restrictions.entity_transfer: May assign to 100%-owned entity; controlling interest if family members

guaranty.notes: No separate guaranty agreement; spousal acknowledgement confirms spouse has read and understands FA

liquidated_damages.no_exemplary_damages: Neither party may claim special, exemplary, or punitive damages

dispute_resolution.method: Mediation first (AAA, commercial rules), then binding arbitration if unresolved within 10 business days
dispute_resolution.venue: City of Franchisor's headquarters (currently Carlsbad, CA)
dispute_resolution.mediator: Retired judge or attorney experienced in commercial transactions
dispute_resolution.costs: Shared equally for mediation/arbitration; prevailing party entitled to attorney's fees
dispute_resolution.exceptions: Non-curable defaults and quality control defaults excluded from mediation requirement
dispute_resolution.equitable_relief: Franchisor may seek injunctive or other equitable relief for IP violations and confidentiality breaches
dispute_resolution.statute_of_limitations: 1 year from discovery or when should have been discovered (subject to state law)

indemnification.scope: Protect, defend, indemnify and hold harmless Franchisor during and after term
indemnification.covers: All claims arising from franchisee's actions or failure to act, operation of business, or any breach
indemnification.defense_control: Franchisor has right to defend with counsel of its choosing
indemnification.settlement_control: Franchisor retains all rights to settle; franchisee has no right to settle or refuse settlement
indemnification.costs_included: Actual and consequential damages, attorney fees, expert witness fees, investigation costs, court costs, travel

force_majeure.triggers: Natural disasters, strikes, lockouts, labor controversies, extraordinary events beyond control
force_majeure.effect: Obligations postponed during inability to perform
force_majeure.limitations: Does not affect payment obligations; postponement max 6 months

post_termination.payment: All amounts due to Franchisor (may assign to debt collection)
post_termination.de_identification: Discontinue all use of trademarks, trade dress
post_termination.return_materials: Return, destroy, and permanently delete all proprietary information including member lists
post_termination.communications: Stop use of phone numbers, email addresses, similar communication methods
post_termination.non_solicitation: Refrain from soliciting members or personnel
post_termination.lease_assignment: Lease assigns to Jazzercise or nominee

distinctive_clauses: No noncompete — unusual for franchise system
No personal guaranty required — only spousal acknowledgement
Social media violation as non-curable default — franchisee can lose franchise for social media posts
Franchisor can access all computer data with no contractual limitations
Business owners have no renewal right
Franchisor may change goods/services via The Studio without FA amendment
1-year statute of limitations (subject to state law)
